event: The Girlhood of Saint Teresa — Teresa and her brother setting out
description: Two children in elaborate Renaissance-era costumes stand on a stone walkway near a fortress wall. The older child, a girl wearing a richly embroidered long black and gold coat and a feathered hat, holds a green cloth and looks down at her younger brother. The boy, in a red and black slashed doublet with a cap, holds her hand and gazes up at her. The background shows stone battlements and a distant landscape. The painting has a warm, golden tone.
